comment: SPEC 2.6 serialization vectors: empty day, INTEGER NORAD sort (string sort puts '25544' before '5'), duplicate reject.

unsorted_input.comment: records given ISS(25544)-first; canonical bytes MUST sort 5 first (int sort)

reject_duplicate_norad.comment: appending tles[1] again MUST make ContentHash error (silent dedup is non-conforming)
